message:
refactor(edit): Replace iterator allocation with explicit loop

In test_large_document_line_count, the collect() pattern:
  (0..1000).map(|i| format!("Line {i}\n")).collect::<String>()

Creates 1000 separate allocations. Replace with:
  let mut lines = String::new();
  for i in 0..1000 { writeln!(&mut lines, "Line {i}").expect(...); }

This preallocates a single String and writes directly to it.
Minor performance improvement in test code, but better patterns
are worth maintaining even in tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
